response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional software engineering breadth and depth across 15+ years, this role requires native-level Japanese proficiency—explicitly stated as a required qualification—which is entirely absent from the resume. Additionally, the role demands specialist expertise in C programming for embedded systems, security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, tamper detection), Linux kernel modification, and networking—none evident in a career trajectory focused on web services, cloud infrastructure, and full-stack development.
strengths: Demonstrates 15+ years of versatile software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded platforms with strong capacity to learn new technology domains quickly
Extensive backend and infrastructure expertise including DevOps, Docker, CI/CD, and server-side optimization at scale (handling millions of requests per second)
Active open-source contributor and community educator with proven ability to design and own complete product features through the full development lifecycle
concerns: Resume contains no evidence of native-level or intermediate Japanese language proficiency, which is a required qualification for this position
No demonstrated expertise in security technologies, encryption protocols, authentication systems (802.1X, Captive Portal), or embedded security—core to the role's responsibilities

Career trajectory shows consistent movement away from embedded systems (last embedded work 2012–2014) toward web/cloud services; recent 10+ years centered on TypeScript/Node.js with no mention of C programming or Linux kernel experience
